text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: TAF Annual Managed Care Plan (APL) RIFs │ October 2022 │ V 1.1 12 

MC_ENT_GOVT_PCT 

LABEL: Managed Care Entity Percent of Revenue from Medicare and Medicaid — Latest in Year 

DESCRIPTION: The percentage of the managed care entity’s total revenue that is derived from contracts with 
Medicare (Parts C and D) in the state and State Medicaid agency contract(s) in the prior calendar year; 
most recent in the calendar year. 

SHORT NAME: MC_ENT_GOVT_PCT
